name: Fujita Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujita Engineering Co., Ltd. engages in the facilities construction business in Japan and internationally. The company undertakes air-conditioning and sanitation, electrical, instrumentation, information and communication, mechanical installation, and other works. It is also involved in the sale of industrial equipment; management of equipment maintenance facilities; manufacture of electronic devices; and contract management of water supply and sewerage system. The company was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Takasaki, Japan.
